allow: Bash(node -e "const {Slot} = require\('radix-ui'\); console.log\('Slot type:', typeof Slot\); console.log\('Slot.Root type:', typeof Slot.Root\); console.log\('Slot keys:', Object.keys\(Slot||{}\)\)")

Bash(node -e 'const {Slot} = require\('\\''radix-ui'\\''\); const r = Slot.Root; console.log\('\\''typeof Slot.Root:'\\'', typeof r\); console.log\('\\''__TRACKED_VAR__typeof:'\\'', r && r['\\''__TRACKED_VAR__typeof'\\''] && r['\\''__TRACKED_VAR__typeof'\\''].toString\(\)\); console.log\('\\''render?:'\\'', typeof \(r&&r.render\)\)')

Bash(node -e "const {Slot} = require\('radix-ui'\); const r = Slot.Root; const sym = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols\(r\); console.log\('symbols:', sym.map\(s => s.toString\(\)\)\); console.log\('is forwardRef?:', sym.some\(s => s.toString\(\).includes\('forward'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const slot = require\('@radix-ui/react-slot'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(slot\)\); console.log\('Root type:', typeof slot.Root\); console.log\('default type:', typeof slot.default\)")
